hooks.prompt: LeaseBook docs freshness check. Run `git diff HEAD --name-only 2>/dev/null || git status --short` to see what files changed this turn. If nothing changed in src/, web/src/, infra/, or seed/ — respond with 'No source files changed, skipping docs check' and stop immediately. If source files did change, read .claude/agents/docs-updater.md and follow its instructions: detect and fix only the documentation drift caused by those specific changes. Do not do a full audit — focus only on the sections relevant to what changed (e.g., a new migration needs the migration checklist checked; a new endpoint needs the README port map verified if ports changed; a new dependency needs ADR coverage checked).
